holidays.name: New Year's Day
holidays.local_name: နှစ်သစ်ကူးနေ့
holidays.description: First day of the Gregorian calendar.

holidays.name: Independence Day
holidays.local_name: လွတ်လပ်ရေးနေ့
holidays.description: 76th anniversary of independence from British rule.

holidays.name: Kayin New Year Day
holidays.local_name: ကရင်နှစ်သစ်ကူးနေ့
holidays.description: Traditional New Year of the Kayin people (First day of Pyatho).

holidays.name: Union Day
holidays.local_name: ပြည်ထောင်စုနေ့

holidays.name: Peasants' Day
holidays.local_name: တောင်သူလယ်သမားနေ့
holidays.description: Honoring the workers of the agricultural sector.

holidays.name: Full Moon Day of Tabaung
holidays.local_name: တပေါင်းလပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: Last full moon of the Burmese calendar year.

holidays.name: Armed Forces Day
holidays.local_name: တပ်မတော်နေ့
holidays.description: Commemorates the resistance against Japanese occupation.

holidays.name: Thingyan Water Festival (Eve)
holidays.local_name: သင်္ကြန်အကြိုနေ့
holidays.description: Start of the 9-day Thingyan public holiday.

holidays.name: Myanmar New Year Day
holidays.local_name: မြန်မာနှစ်ဆန်းတစ်ရက်နေ့
holidays.description: The first day of the Myanmar New Year.

holidays.name: Labour Day
holidays.local_name: အလုပ်သမားနေ့

holidays.name: Full Moon Day of Kason
holidays.local_name: ကဆုန်လပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: Buddha Day celebrating birth, enlightenment, and death.

holidays.name: Martyrs' Day
holidays.local_name: အာဇာနည်နေ့
holidays.description: Commemorates General Aung San and other fallen leaders.

holidays.name: Full Moon Day of Waso
holidays.local_name: ဝါဆိုလပြည့်နေ့

holidays.name: Full Moon Day of Thadingyut
holidays.local_name: သီတင်းကျွတ်လပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: End of Buddhist Lent - Light Festival.

holidays.name: Full Moon Day of Tazaungmone
holidays.local_name: တန်ဆောင်မုန်းလပြည့်နေ့

holidays.name: National Day
holidays.description: Anniversary of the first student boycott against colonial education.

holidays.name: Christmas Day
holidays.local_name: ခရစ္စမတ်နေ့

holidays.name: Kayin New Year Day
holidays.local_name: ကရင်နှစ်သစ်ကူးနေ့
